snippet.title: Marvel Studios' Captain Marvel - Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Higher. Further. Faster. Watch the trailer for Marvel Studios’ Captain Marvel, in theaters March 8, 2019.

► Subscribe to Marvel: http://bit.ly/WeO3YJ
